summary: Added one opening continuity line to carry forward the unresolved June-missing thread from Chapter 8; the Chapter 9 exit already aligned with Chapter 10 and was left intact.
edits: Inserted one sentence near the opening that carries forward Nia's midnight status: June's Honda on Bayou Road bridge shoulder, no blood, June still missing.
Preserved the existing chapter-ending handoff to the Chapter 10 levee operation without changes.
